content.claim: Since 2013, school maintenance has been centralized under the Public Education Act; the Klebelsberg Institution Maintenance Centre (KLIK) controls finances, teacher employment, and curriculum across 198 school districts, removing municipal authority over closure and merger decisions.
content.context: Fresh live research through the School network planning lens
limitations: Does not quantify the rate of closures attributable to centralization versus demographics
Governance structure does not directly measure capacity thresholds or access outcomes
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
